title: ApexCompatibilities
description: Provides compatibility for various mods for all of ApexStudios' mods
body: **ApexCompatibilities** is a addon mod for all of **ApexStudios'** mods, which provides mod support for a variety of mods. ### **Recipe Viewers** ApexCompatibilities will allow you to lookup our custom recipe types for the follow mods, as well as grouping items in the ingredient list where possible. - [Roughly Enough Items](https://modrinth.com/mod/rei) - [Just Enough Items](https://modrinth.com/mod/jei) ### **Generic** - [Jade](https://modrinth.com/mod/jade) --- [Join us on **Discord**](https://discord.apexmodder.com/) [](https://discord.apexmodder.com/) [![bisecthosting-banner](https://www.bisecthosting.com/partners/custom-banners/f4d8198a-6c2a-4d86-8d74-1977589e8ef7.webp)](https://www.bisecthosting.com/apexstudios)
